description: Debt contract. Written and signed by Ḥalfon b. Menashshe. Dated: First third of Elul 1446 Seleucid = September 1135 CE, under the authority of Maṣliaḥ Gaʾon. One of the parties is Hiba. Also signed by Natan b. Shelomo ha-Kohen and Moshe b. Binyamin ha-Sefaradi.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
